Yellow Web Tools

Draggable bookmarklets for Facebook ads.

yellowweb.top · Hub source · Telegram

Ad Replica

build 210526b6

Campaign export, import, clone, media, identities, pixels, and catalogs for Ads Manager.

Landing GitHub source Ad Replica

Auto Rules Manager

build 150526b13

Automated rules export, import, deletion, status switching, and currency-safe threshold migration.

Landing GitHub source Auto Rules

Columns Manager

build 250526b5

Export Ads Manager column presets into one JSON or separate files, and import presets into an ad account.

Landing GitHub source Columns

FP Blocked Manager

build 250526b4

Export and import Facebook Page blocked users as TXT, one user ID per line.

Landing GitHub source FP Blocked

FP Content Manager

build 250526b7

Copy content live from one Facebook Page to another, create chronology dates, and clean Page content.

Landing GitHub source FP Content

FB Ivan Auto Scroll

build 260526b1

Facebook Reels and Feed auto-scroll panel with modes, breaks, night pause, session limits, and embedded loader fallback.

Landing GitHub source FB Ivan
Hub build 260526b1. Click a yellow bookmarklet to copy it, or drag it to the bookmarks bar.
